scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,app -c magenta,cyan --kill-others-on-fail "cd backend && cargo run" "wait-on tcp:3001 && cd frontend && pnpm dev"
scripts.desktop: concurrently -n backend,app,tauri -c magenta,cyan,blue --kill-others-on-fail "cd backend && cargo run" "wait-on tcp:3001 && cd frontend && pnpm dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && cargo tauri dev"
scripts.ios: concurrently --raw --kill-others-on-fail "cd backend && cargo run" "wait-on tcp:3001 && cd frontend && pnpm dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && cargo tauri ios dev"
scripts.android: concurrently -n backend,app,tauri -c magenta,cyan,blue --kill-others-on-fail "cd backend && cargo run" "wait-on tcp:3001 && cd frontend && pnpm dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && cargo tauri android dev"
